description: For subject DM-105 in the Phase II Diabetes Trial, document the emergency unblinding and schedule an SAE event. Login to OpenClinica with username 'root' and password 'Admin123!'. Document the PI's authorization for unblinding for subject DM-105 using a discrepancy note (Annotation) containing the keyword 'unblinding'. Schedule a new instance of the 'Unscheduled SAE' event for DM-105 for today's date and include a discrepancy note (Annotation) with the text 'Severe Hypoglycemia'.
